Disclaimer This is an AI-assisted live blog with updates sourced from multiple news outlets and agencies Disclaimer

During today's session, shares of Cochin Shipyard experienced a notable increase, with the price rising by 2.01%. The current price of Cochin Shipyard is Rs 1,942.10, reflecting positive movement in the stock's value.

Cochin Shipyard is included in the NIFTY MIDCAP 150 index. The stock's performance is closely watched by investors, especially given its significance as a mid-cap company. According to Moneycontrol analysis, the sentiment for Cochin Shipyard has been bullish as of 2025-05-16.

data.title: Honasa Consumer shares jump 12% after Q4 revenue rises 13% to over Rs 533 crore
data.description:
Honasa Consumer shares jump 12% after Q4 revenue rises 13% to over Rs 533 crore

  • Watchlist
  • Portfolio
  • Message
  • Set Alert
 
 
live
  • bselive
  • nselive
Volume
Todays L/H
More

Honasa Consumer share price jumped 12 percent on Friday on the back of strong March quarter results, announced a day before on May 22 after the market hours.

Shares of Honasa Consumer Ltd. touched an intraday high of Rs 314 per share on the NSE, rising 14.12 percent. The stock had opened with a gain of 3.58 percent in today's trading session. The counter has been gaining for the last two days and is up over 15 percent in the period.

Disclaimer: The views and investment tips expressed by experts on Moneycontrol are their own and not those of the website or its management. Moneycontrol advises users to check with certified experts before taking any investment decisions.

data.title: Top Midcap Losers Today: GMR Airports, Container Corp, KPR Mill stocks drag on Nifty Midcap index
data.description:
Disclaimer This is an AI-assisted live blog with updates sourced from multiple news outlets and agencies Disclaimer

During today's session, the NIFTY MIDCAP 150 witnessed declines, with several stocks among the top losers. According to recent market data, GMR Airports, Container Corp, and KPR Mill experienced notable decreases. This downturn reflects the day's trading dynamics within the midcap segment.

Among the top losers in the NIFTY MIDCAP 150, GMR Airports declined by 2.36% to Rs 86.85, Container Corp fell by 2.03% to Rs 723.00, and KPR Mill decreased by 1.91% to Rs 1,159.25. Additionally, NALCO saw a decrease of 1.6% to Rs 182.00, and Berger Paints was down by 1.48% to Rs 558.00.
